title: HashChainEntry
description: Hash Chain Canonicalize v0.2 entry schema (8 required fields, additionalProperties: false)

canonicalPayload.description: RFC 8785 JCS canonicalized JSON string; minimum length 2 = '{}' empty object

canonicalPayloadHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of (canonicalPayloadBytes || chainIdentityJcsBytes) UTF-8 bytes (v0.2 upgraded preimage)

previousHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of previous entry; genesis = 64 zeros

chainPosition.description: Non-negative monotonically increasing position in chain

chainIdentity.description: Mandatory field in v0.2; the three chainIdentity fields are JCS-canonicalized and then fed into the hash preimage

hccVersion.description: HCC protocol version; the only valid value in v0.2 is '2.0.0'; schema breaking change vs v0.1 '1.0.0'
